title: Vanilla Elevated
description: A minecraft "vanilla" experience which, in my opinion, is quite good.
body:
![Vanilla Elevated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ced9ba84f9004544a8ac91128e3777dc92435e.png)



Discover Vanilla Elevated, the ultimate modpack for reliving the pure essence of Minecraft with stunning graphics, subtle enhancements and some new mechanics, that preserve the game's classic heart.

This pack delivers a true vanilla+ experience: extreme **optimization** for FPS gains, **shader** support, **fluid animations**, **textures and resources packs**, and adding **new mechanics** that dont disrupt the vanilla balance.

##

### Enhanced Graphics
Full shader compatibility, dynamic lighting, realistic particles, and HD textures that transform the vanilla world into artwork.

##

### Ultra-Optimized Performance
Sodium, Iris, Lithium, and more for thousands of FPS on modest PCs, fast chunk loading, and buttery-smooth rendering.

##

### New Mechanics
Cooking, backpacks, sleeping backs, new bosses! All of that and more, but always respecting the vanilla experience.

##

### Subtle QoL Improvements
Revamped HUD, better controls, intuitive inventory, and full vanilla server compatibility.

##

### Immersive Sounds & Atmosphere
Upgraded audio effects and ambient details for deeper vanilla nostalgia.

##

### Lightweight & Compatible
A modpack built for Fabric on 1.20.1, perfect for singleplayer or multiplayer with no hassle.

##

Play like the old days, but with the beauty and smoothness you deserve. Ideal for explorers, builders, and survivors who love pure, polished Minecraft.

Version: 1.20.1 | Fabric
Compatibility: Client & Server
Install and rediscover Minecraft.
